changelog: DNS routing through VPN tunnel: DoH (1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8, 9.9.9.9) replaces plain UDP DNS
DNS fallback list: 1.1.1.1 → 8.8.8.8 → 9.9.9.9 with IPv4-only strategy
Admin DNS probe: test resolvers from server with latency + per-domain results
Admin devices table: CONNECTED / ROUTED / DNS OK three-state status indicators
Admin NAT repair: sudo wrapper fixed (www-data can now run iptables via privileged script)
Admin Repair NAT button: auto-fixes ip_forward, MASQUERADE, saves rules, restarts Xray
